info.name: Clinical Synthesis Hub - Comprehensive Order Management GraphQL
info.description: Complete Postman collection for testing Order Management Service (CPOE Core) GraphQL operations through API Gateway > Auth > Apollo Federation Gateway > Order Management Microservice. Includes all 43 comprehensive operations covering authentication, order creation, clinical decision support, order sets, lifecycle management, federation, analytics, and health checks.

item.name: 🔐 Authentication

request.description: Authenticate with Supabase and get JWT token for API access with automatic token extraction
Verify the authentication token and get user context including roles and permissions

item.description: Authentication operations to get and verify JWT tokens with RBAC support

item.name: 📋 Order Creation & Capture
Create Clinical Order (FHIR ServiceRequest) - Full 60+ Fields

request.description: Create a comprehensive FHIR-compliant clinical order with full 60+ field implementation including all required and optional FHIR ServiceRequest fields

item.name: Create Medication Order (FHIR MedicationRequest) - Complete Dosing & Dispensing

request.description: Create a comprehensive medication order with complete dosing instructions, dispensing details, substitution rules, and clinical context

item.name: Create Lab Order - Specimen Requirements & Clinical Context

request.description: Create a comprehensive lab order with detailed specimen requirements, collection instructions, and clinical context

item.name: Create Imaging Order - Modality, Contrast & Radiation Safety

request.description: Create a comprehensive imaging order with modality specifications, contrast requirements, radiation safety considerations, and clinical context
Get a specific order by ID

item.description: Core clinical order management operations including order lifecycle management, clinical decision support integration, order sets/protocols, and FHIR-compliant data models

item.name: 🩺 Clinical Decision Support
Create Order with Clinical Decision Support

request.description: Create order with clinical decision support alerts and recommendations
Check for potential drug interactions before order creation

item.description: Clinical decision support integration with drug interaction checking, allergy alerts, and clinical guidelines

item.name: 📋 Order Sets & Protocols

request.description: Create standardized order set for hypertension management
Create standardized order set for diabetes management

item.description: Standardized order sets and clinical protocols for common conditions and procedures

item.name: 🔄 Order Lifecycle Management

request.description: Sign and activate a draft order
Put an order on hold
Cancel an active order

item.description: Complete order lifecycle management including draft, active, hold, cancel, and complete states

item.name: 🔗 Federation & Cross-Service Queries

request.description: Test federation between Patient and Order services
Test federation between User and Order services

item.description: Apollo Federation testing with cross-service queries and entity resolution

item.name: 🔍 Schema & Introspection

request.description: Introspect the GraphQL schema to see available types and fields
Get all available GraphQL types including Order Management types

item.description: GraphQL schema introspection and type exploration

item.name: 🏥 Health Checks & Service Status

request.description: Check API Gateway health status
Check Order Management Service health status
Check Apollo Federation Gateway health status
Test GraphQL endpoint connectivity through API Gateway

item.description: Health checks for all services in the architecture flow
